{{Relic Infobox|Nutritious Soup|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Enchant|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Tezcatara's Ember|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Eternal|2}}
{{R|Nutritious Soup||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} that {{KW|Enchant|Enchants|2}} all {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strikes|2}} in your Deck with {{KW|Tezcatara's Ember||2}}.

== Obtaining Nutritious Soup ==
Can be offered at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]] by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Nutritious Soup''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Very Hot Cocoa||2}} and {{R|Yummy Cookie||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.
<!-- Maybe there is a threshold for minimum Strike and/or unupgraded Strikes in order to see this. -->
== Notes ==
* {{R|Nutritious Soup||2}} will ''not'' {{KW|Enchant||2}} any {{C|Ultimate Strike|Ultimate Strikes}} in your Deck.
* If any {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strikes|2}} are already {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}, they will not be given {{KW|Tezcatara's Ember||2}}, as each card can only be {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} once.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Nutritious Soup to the game.
